title.en: What to say when entering the home

items.arabicText: (بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا، ثُمَّ لِيُسَلِّمْ عَلَى أَهْلِهِ).

translations.en: (In the name of Allah we enter and in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we place our trust.)
